items.name: Black Pink Emo Silver Spike Cropped Knit Hoodie
items.description:
Celine Kwan has been FabriX’s closest collaborator since its very first show, exemplifying a partnership deeply rooted in creativity. Over the years, FabriX has witnessed the journey of “Holly” Celine’s beloved pet and constant muse, whose spirit continuously inspires her collections. This latest showcase tells the evolving story of Holly—from a “good girl” to an “I’m not cute” rebel, fiercely expressing her defiance beneath her seemingly adorable exterior. 

The collection includes standout pieces from Celine’s "NEVER CUTE, ALWAYS ADORABLE" line, a daring and unapologetic reimagination that challenges the brand’s traditionally “kawaii” aesthetic. Featuring graphic prints, metal-studded accessories, and Celine’s signature dog motifs, the designs capture the spirit of cute rebellion. Punk-infused elements are artfully contrasted with soft, puffy silhouettes, embodying the raw, youthful energy of a generation that redefined mainstream ideals of beauty and perfection.
items.searchText:

the collection includes standout pieces from celine’s "never cute, always adorable" line, a daring and unapologetic reimagination that challenges the brand’s traditionally “kawaii” aesthetic. featuring graphic prints, metal-studded accessories, and celine’s signature dog motifs, the designs capture the spirit of cute rebellion. punk-infused elements are artfully contrasted with soft, puffy silhouettes, embodying the raw, youthful energy of a generation that redefined mainstream ideals of beauty and perfection. fabrix world clothing sweaters babycore barbie chibi cowboy cutecore cutegore emo furry girly gyaru kawaii metal preppy rogangster scene softie urban

items.name: Dragon Tail - Scales of the Dread - Red and Black
items.description:
BLACK VERSION: https://www.roblox.com/catalog/71521304122084/Dragon-Tail-Scales-of-the-Dread-Black

Realistic red and black medieval Dragon monster tail. Based on a certain dragon "the Dread" from "Elden".
Can fit with alternative styles like goth, emo and more due to that black color being able to fit with many things!
It is also perfect for monster, animal or scalie like avatars. 

Embrace the dragon!
Check out our group for more.
